app_title: Open Slap! Motor agéntico para makers
github_token_help: Token de acceso personal de GitHub (classic o fine-grained).
google_token_help: Token de acceso OAuth de Google (Bearer).
telegram_token_help: Token del bot de Telegram. Después de conectar, haz clic en “Generar código” y envía “/link TU_CODIGO” al bot.
telegram_link_code_body_1: 1) En la app: Conectores → Telegram → Generar código
telegram_link_code_body_2: 2) En Telegram: envía al bot: /link TU_CODIGO
automation_client_help_body_1: Este conector apunta a un servicio externo (p. ej., Tera) que ejecuta automatizaciones fuera de Open Slap (browser, integraciones, rutinas).
automation_client_help_body_2: El agente llama a este servicio via Base URL con una API key (Bearer). El endpoint /health se usa para la prueba.
automation_client_help_body_3: Ejemplo: Base URL = https://tu-automator.com  |  Health check = GET https://tu-automator.com/health
no_history_results: No hay resultados en el historial.
todo_placeholder: Describe un TODO para esta tarea…
no_todos: No hay TODOs en esta tarea.
create_new_agent_prompt: Crea un nuevo agente. Haz preguntas para recopilar los datos necesarios (nombre, objetivo, habilidades, límites) y genera el paquete del agente al final.
onboarding_intro: Open Slap! es un workspace agéntico. Así puedes empezar rápidamente:
onboarding_step_task_desc: Haz clic en “➕ Tarea” en el menú. La skill de CTO se carga automáticamente — describe tu proyecto y creará un plan estructurado.
onboarding_step_skills_desc: Ve a Configuración → Central de habilidades para ver las skills (CTO, DevOps, SEO…). Haz clic en una skill para abrirla y ejecutarla.
onboarding_step_connectors_desc: Ve a Configuración → Conectores para integrar GitHub, Google Calendar o Gmail.
onboarding_step_feedback_desc: Califica respuestas del assistente con 👍/👎. Esto ayuda a ajustar lo que es útil.
onboarding_step_projects_desc: Crea un proyecto en Configuración → Proyectos para compartir contexto entre tarefas.
onboarding_privacy_note: Ninguna información personal se envía fuera. Puedes editar o completar después en Configuración.
onboarding_providers_desc: Open Slap! funciona con los principales providers de IA. Elige uno o más para comenzar. Si no tienes una clave, obtén una gratuita en los enlaces.
onboarding_local_llm_desc: Ejecuta modelos en tu máquina, sin internet. Instala Ollama y descarga un modelo.
onboarding_configure_later: Configura tus claves en Configuración → LLM en cualquier momento.
llm_free_keys_body: If you don’t use paid providers or local LLMs, you can get one or more free API keys from the services below.
routing_debug_hint: By default, chat shows only agent and model. Debug mode shows routing rationale.
skills_hint_open: Click a skill to open in read mode.
save_error_body: Could not save skills. Please try again.
invalid_json_body: Could not save. Fix the JSON and try again.
soul_update_error: Could not add update to SOUL.
create_agent_assistant_message: Ok — I'll help you create a new agent. Tell me what you want it to do.
agent_prompt_placeholder: Define a base prompt (tone, limits, priorities, context).
sandbox_help_line_1: Sandbox mode defines how much the agent can interact with your computer and external resources.
sandbox_help_off_2: Can write local files and generate deliveries/artifacts.
sandbox_help_on_1: Blocks OS commands and file writes (reduces local change risk).
sandbox_help_on_2: Disables connectors and web retrieval (reduces exposure to external services).
sandbox_help_privacy_1: Sandbox does not prevent the text you send from being forwarded to the configured LLM provider.
sandbox_help_privacy_2: For maximum code privacy, prefer a local LLM and avoid pasting secrets.
security_caps_warning: This reduces the agent ability to write and deliver local code/artifacts.
boot_input_placeholder: Escribe tu mensaje y presiona Enter…
llm_api_key_hint_env: Key available via .env (not saved on the server). To override, click “Change key”.
llm_api_key_hint_saved: Key saved (not shown). To change, click “Change key”.
llm_api_key_hint_storage: The key is stored securely on this computer local server. It will not be shown again after saving.
llm_api_key_warning_shared: Warning: on a shared computer, others with access to the same Windows user may use this local server and consume your credentials. Use separate OS profiles.
no_saved_keys: No saved keys for this provider.
automation_client_hint: Configure a remote automation service. The server will store credentials locally and the agent may use it as a connector.
system_profile_hint_1: This profile is collected by the local server (Windows/macOS/Linux) and helps avoid recurring questions like “what OS version are you on?”.
system_profile_hint_2: Warning: it may contain sensitive information (computer name, network, etc.). Use “Remove” if you prefer not to store it.
goals_placeholder: e.g. study; build my systems; understand how the system works...
onboarding_welcome_hint: You can adjust this later in Settings → SOUL and Settings → LLM.
onboarding_profile_intro: Before we start, share a few basics so I can get to know you better. No personal information is sent outside. You can edit this later in settings.
onboarding_llm_intro: Open Slap! is an interface to interact, explore, and create using AI. If you have an account (e.g. ChatGPT, Claude, OpenRouter/Groq/Gemini) or a local LLM installed, setup is quick. In minutes you can start using the system.
onboarding_llm_hint: Register your keys in Settings → LLM. If you are starting from scratch, we provide a way to get free and legitimate keys to use the system (internet required). See it in settings.
connectors_oauth_hint: Note: OAuth login flow is not integrated yet. For Google Calendar/Gmail use a pasted access token in the connector. For GitHub, use a Personal Access Token (PAT).
auto_approve_all_plans_desc: All plans run automatically. Irreversible actions without confirmation.
provider_not_available_fallback: The saved provider is not available. The system will use {{provider}} as fallback.
jwt_description: Controls the login token duration. Larger values increase risk if a token leaks. Applies to newly issued tokens (may require sign out/in).
auto_approvals_desc: Commands here may run automatically when identical. Remove if you no longer want this permission.
remove_permission_confirm: Remove this auto-approval? The command will ask for confirmation again.
auto_detected_ollama: Auto-detected when running on default port.
start_new_project: I want to start a new project.
password_reset_success: Password reset. You can now sign in.
sabrina_greeting_new: Sabrina? Please introduce yourself briefly and ask what my top priority is today. Then ask 3 objective questions and propose next steps.
sabrina_greeting_returning: Sabrina? I'm here. No intro/repetition: ask only 1–3 objective questions and drive to the next steps.
jwt_risk_high: High risk: long sessions increase the abuse window if a token leaks.
jwt_risk_warning: Warning: longer sessions increase the abuse window if a token leaks.
jwt_risk_low: Short sessions improve security but may require more frequent logins.
jwt_new_tokens_note: This applies to newly issued tokens (you may need to sign out/in again).
note_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this note?
not_authenticated_sign_in: Not authenticated. Please sign in again.
backend_unreachable_hint: Backend seems unreachable (port 5150). Check if backend is running and Vite proxy targets the correct address.
kickoff_prompt_user: Project kickoff "{{projectName}}" was updated with "{{fileName}}". Read the project Markdown and structure: goals, scope, deliverables, initial backlog, risks, and next steps.
kickoff_prompt_internal:
Immediately emit a structured plan block for approval:
```plan
Task: Plan MVP | project
Task: Define initial backlog | project
Task: Design minimal UI | project
Task: Implement task CRUD | software_operator
Task: Local persistence (LocalStorage/SQLite) | software_operator
Task: Minimal tests and README | project
```
After the ```plan``` block, reply with the kickoff analysis (goals, scope, deliverables, initial backlog, risks, next steps).
command_permissions_body:
Allow only now executes this command once.

Allow automatically saves a permission to auto-run this exact command in the future.

Use "Allow automatically" only for low-risk, well-known commands.
task_agents_prompt:
I want to see the available agents and how to use each one.

You are Sabrina and must respond with practical guidance for software projects and code.

Agents (Experts) available in the system:
{{expertLines}}

Skills relevant for projects/code:
{{skillLines}}

Deliver:
- A table (Agent/Skill | When to use | Example commands)
- A recommended flow to create a software project (from idea to deployment)
- 3 quick questions to tailor the guidance to my case
agent_talk_prompt: I want to talk to agent {{agentName}}.
context_editor_placeholder: Kickoff, scope, stack, constraints, links, credentials (never the secret value), etc.
kickoff_artifact_desc: This is the global kickoff artifact: one Markdown context per project. Sabrina can generate/update this content during project kickoff.
kickoff_howto_body:
1) Create/activate a project
2) Import a .md file with context
3) The system emits a plan (```plan block)
4) Click Approve to create the backlog (TODOs) and start execution

Tip: use templates in docs/kickoff_templates/.
memory_dream_desc: Dream consolidates derived memories (snapshot) and performs hygiene (decay/prune). RAW history (SQL) is never deleted.
memory_import_hint: Use the prompt below in your other AI provider to generate a Markdown summary. Then upload the .md file here to import it as memory with "imported" provenance.
memory_imported_body: Memory imported and recorded with "imported" provenance.
memory_remove_import_body: Remove this memory import? This deletes the imported events.
memory_search_hint: Searches the raw SQL history (messages). Does not alter or delete RAW.
metrics_s_curve: Project S-Curve (PV vs EV vs AC)
note_select_hint: Click on a note in the list or create a new note to start writing.
project_context_empty: Sabrina has not generated context for this project yet.
project_delete_confirm_body: Delete "{{projectName}}"? This removes the project and unlinks associated conversations/tasks.
retro_placeholder: Log project learnings to avoid mistakes in future runs...
skill_creation_prompt: Create a new skill. Ask questions to collect the needed data (name, purpose, inputs/outputs, examples) and generate an implementation. At the end, validate with a checklist and suggest tests.
skill_no_prompt: This skill has no execution prompt.
tap_not_populated: No Project Charter (TAP) populated yet. Click "Edit TAP" or describe the project in the chat to let agents generate it.
tap_section_1_placeholder: What problem does the project solve...
tap_section_3_placeholder: What is in scope, phases, main packages...
tap_section_4_placeholder: High level risks identified, budget or time limits...
